items.title: Americas Real Estate: REITs: June '26 Office Update: New York touring demand dips while SF shows incremental growth
items.summary: We review the latest updates on (1) VTS office tour activity through June '26, (2) Return to office trends by market, and (3) San Francisco and NYC office leasing data.

items.title: Singapore Real Estate: 2Q26 preview: Opportunity post rates-driven correction; Upgrade MPACT, Downgrade MLT
items.summary: Despite headwinds from higher for longer interest rates, Singapore real estate has been resilient supported by relatively steady domestic rates and a firm currency, outperforming most developed market peers even as it tr...

items.title: Australia and New Zealand Economics Analyst: House Prices to Fall, Incomes to Stall, Spending to Slow
items.summary: A slowdown in household consumption growth is a key domestic macro risk to watch. We forecast consumer spending growth to decelerate 120bp to 1.3%yoy by end-2026, driven by a decline in household wealth and softer real income growth.

items.title: Terreno Realty Corp. (TRNO): 2Q26 Operating update: Occupancy & spreads above GS expectations
items.summary: TRNO released its 2Q26 operating update on July 8. Here we discuss the results and trends in detail and make minor adjustments to our model.

items.title: Australia and New Zealand Economics Analyst: Calibrating Our Nowcasts to Track Slower Consumption
items.summary: We forecast consumer spending growth to decelerate 120bp to 1.3%yoy by end-2026, driven by a decline in household wealth and softer real income growth. A steeper slowdown in household consumption growth is a key domestic macro risk to watch.

items.summary: Investors remain focused on industrial demand and supply, wondering when demand can outweigh new supply creating market rent growth - and whether that will prompt more development starts. As a result, we review: Industri...

items.title: Japan Hotel REIT (8985.T): Earnings estimates and target price revised based on latest results and monthly data; Buy
items.summary: We revise our earnings estimates and target price based on FY12/25 results, the new property acquisition (Hyatt Regency Tokyo), recent inbound tourist trends, and monthly data for the 29 hotels with variable rents owned by the company.

items.title: Sekisui House Reit Inc. (3309.T): In line: Domestic residential solid, but monitoring US rental condo market/property sales trends, Neutral
items.summary: The REIT announced FP4/26 earnings after the market close on June 15. FP4/26 DPU of ¥3,407 was slightly below GSe (¥3,447) but largely in line with expectations. The REIT's DPU guidance for FP10/26 and FP4/27 is ¥1,908 and ¥1,880, respectively.
